TRANSFORMING RURAL HEALTH ACROSS KANSAS

Transparency. Accountability. Better Health.

Kansas received $221.9 million in federal funding through the Rural Health Transformation Program to strengthen rural healthcare systems and improve patient outcomes across 105 counties.
